w:r.w:t: (Barite) Exporter from India – API Grade | High Purity | Bulk Supply
sourcing from mines in Andhra Pradesh & Rajasthan
Consistent API-grade supply for Oil & Gas drilling
— API, Drilling & Industrial Grade, Shipped Worldwide"
Sub-headline: SG range, purity %, countries shipped to
Background: mine or loading dock imagery (not stock)
Live WhatsApp / Enquiry button — high conversion on mobile
Stats that matter to buyers instantly
Tonnes exported per year / countries served / years in business
Min order quantity & lead time range
Detailed grade cards with specs table
Each grade as a card with its own specs — buyer should know immediately which grade fits their use case
. TDS for each grade and some basic lines
Paint & Coating Grade — brightness, oil absorption, particle size D50/D97
Medical / X-Ray Grade — purity %, soluble barium limits
Filler / Rubber Grade — whiteness index, bulk density
Visual map of Indian mining regions (Andhra Pradesh, Rajasthan, MP) — tells both buyers and potential mine partners you know the belt
Mention of captive mine tie-ups vs spot sourcing
CTA for mines: "Are you a mine owner? Partner with us"
Direct access to multiple mines → no supply disruption
Experience in Africa, Middle East, Southeast Asia
“We don’t depend on a single mine — ensuring consistent supply even in high-demand periods.”
Assured bulk offtake for export markets
Flexible working model (direct supply / stock & sale)
“If you are a mine owner or processor, connect with us for long-term export collaboration.”
What is the minimum order quantity?
What payment terms do you accept?
TT, LC or can be discussed
Do you provide samples before bulk order?
Can you customise mesh size / SG to our spec?
